summary: Stopped Chrome's natively auto-grouped tabs (a new tab opened from a grouped tab inherits that group at birth) from being permanently recorded into a label and re-grouped forever. Such tabs are now flagged at onCreated and ejected once their real URL loads unless that URL is a deliberate label member, and the prototype's grouping decision logic was deconstructed into single-concern, test-covered helpers.

changes.title: Flag Chrome-auto-grouped tabs and clear the flag on intent or removal
changes.description: Added a module-level autoGroupedTabs Set, mirroring the existing pendingUngroups pattern. onCreated flags a brand-new unpinned tab that is already in a group (Chrome's per-tab inheritance), onRemoved clears the flag so the set never leaks stale ids, and a deliberate groupId change in handleActiveTabsGroupChanges clears it because explicit intent overrides the inherited flag.

tests.name: clears the auto-group flag on a deliberate group change
tests.description: An explicit groupId change recorded into a label clears any earlier auto-group flag so the tab is not later ejected.

tests.name: clears the auto-group flag when a flagged tab is removed
tests.description: onRemoved deletes the tab id from autoGroupedTabs so the in-memory set never leaks stale ids.

changes.title: Eject auto-grouped non-members instead of making them sticky
changes.description: Extracted ejectAutoGroupedTab from the groupTabs in-group branch: it defers while the URL is still the bare 'url-' placeholder, re-reads labels from fresh storage to avoid an ungroup-then-regroup flicker when the URL is genuinely a member, and otherwise ungroups the tab (guarded by pendingUngroups) and clears the flag. The shared urlKeyIsMember predicate centralizes the membership check, so an auto-grouped tab whose URL is a deliberate member stays grouped and is no longer recorded as a fresh sticky member.

tests.name: is true when the urlKey is present in the label
tests.description: urlKeyIsMember reports membership when the urlKey is in the label's urlKeys.

tests.name: is false when the urlKey is absent
tests.description: urlKeyIsMember reports non-membership when the urlKey is not recorded.

tests.name: is false for a label with no urlKeys
tests.description: An empty urlKeys list claims no members.

tests.name: is false when the label is undefined or null
tests.description: A missing label is treated as non-membership rather than throwing.

tests.name: returns wait and does nothing while the URL is still unloaded
tests.description: While the urlKey is the bare 'url-' placeholder, ejection is deferred and no ungroup is issued.

tests.name: keeps the tab and clears the flag when fresh storage shows membership
tests.description: Flicker guard: a stale in-memory snapshot says non-member but fresh storage says member, so the tab is kept and the flag cleared.

tests.name: ungroups a confirmed non-member and tracks the in-flight ungroup
tests.description: A confirmed non-member is ungrouped, added to pendingUngroups, and removed from autoGroupedTabs.

tests.name: ejects an auto-grouped non-member and does not record its URL
tests.description: End-to-end through groupTabs: an auto-grouped tab whose URL is not a member is ungrouped and never recorded into the label.

tests.name: keeps an auto-grouped tab whose URL is a deliberate member
tests.description: Membership beats the flag: an auto-grouped tab whose URL is a deliberate member stays grouped and gets its flag cleared.

changes.title: Isolate the label-recording (startup-sync) path
changes.description: Extracted recordInGroupTab, which records a non-auto-grouped in-group tab's URL into its label (seeding the label with the group's mapped color when absent) and persists via update. This now runs only for non-auto-grouped tabs such as startup sync of pre-existing Chrome groups, so Chrome's per-tab inheritance is no longer a recording trigger.

tests.name: seeds a missing label with the tab urlKey and mapped color
tests.description: Recording into a non-existent label seeds it with the tab urlKey and the group color mapped to hex.

tests.name: pushes the urlKey into an existing label
tests.description: Recording into an existing label appends the urlKey rather than overwriting.

tests.name: persists the updated labels to storage
tests.description: Recording persists the updated labels object via update to chrome.storage.local.set.

changes.title: Gate the prototype's grouping diagnostics behind a debug flag
changes.description: Replaced the prototype's eight unconditional console.log('[TC-GROUP] ...') statements at the group decision points with a single debugGroup helper gated behind a module-level DEBUG_GROUPING flag (off by default), keeping the instrumentation available for future diagnosis without shipping console noise.

tests.name: is a no-op that does not throw when disabled
tests.description: With DEBUG_GROUPING off, debugGroup is a safe no-op that returns undefined and never throws regardless of payload shape.
